Good morning, everybody.
My name is Jamie Dorn and I'm the training specialist here at Department IQ.
I'm gonna go ahead and mute my screen just for a couple of minutes to let everybody join uh while we wait.
If you wouldn't mind dropping in the chat, what property you're joining us from today?
Really excited to go ahead and get started at about two after the hour.
All righty, everybody.
Well, it looks like the attendee list has slowed a little bit.
So we're gonna go ahead and dive in.
Uh So for those of you who joined after I did a brief introduction, my name is Jamie.
I'm the customer training specialist here at Apartment IQ.
Really excited to help dive into Apartment IQ today with you and review some of the uh foundational functionality of the system.
Uh for today's session.
We will be covering uh the following um objectives.
We're gonna be talking about.
What exactly is apartment IQ?
How do I navigate apartment IQ?
How can I leverage the data that I see to make action, informed decisions?
And then how is that ultimately gonna save me time and then who do I contact if I need any help.
So to address the first question, what exactly is Apartment IQ?
If you haven't been looped into some conversations previously, let me go ahead and do a little introduction for you.
Apartment IQ is a data analytic tool that will streamline and centralize market survey data for you.
The data that we're pulling into apartment IQ is 100% public.
So no need to worry about private uh data sharing here.
It's not a I give mine, you give yours type of model.
Uh and no need to plug in any data of any sort.
What we're doing is actually uh inspecting websites and pulling in data for you so that you can then log into apartment IQ.
See the data updated every 24 hours by the way and be able to make action informed decisions based on that data and what's happening in your market
now, within apartment IQ, there are two different types of users and I saw that there's quite a mix on the call today.
So I wanna address both of both of these user types.
Uh Because you may find that you have uh one or the other of these, the first user type and the majority of you on the call will have the permissions of a read only user.
What this refers to is you have access to the market surveys that you'll need access to.
So if you oversee one property, you'll have access to that property.

If you oversee multiple properties, you'll have access to those, you'll be able to manipulate the data in filtering, being able to sort it see where you're situated in the market and also be able to pull reports.
We will not however be able to change the competitive properties or uh change and add other users.
Now, if you do need to do that great news is you can actually point to the folks in your team who are admin users and I'll navigate over to that section in just a minute.
So you can kind of get an understanding of who those users are.
Admin users tend to be management, regional leadership.
And above these folks have the access to add and remove other users as new folks come onto your team and they also have the permissions to change competitive properties.

So if there's a brand new build in your area and you want to start tracking that or perhaps there's a property that you're tracking that a year from now, just simply is no longer a comp with, they can actually go in and remove it.
We wanna make sure that you have the most accurate data in there tracking the properties that are important to you and not cluttering up our screen.
I want to point to who you should contact for uh some questions here.
We will come back to this at the end of the call.
Uh But we get asked quite a bit.
Who do I reach out to for various uh points of information?
So I'm gonna just leave that on the screen for you.
The most important is our support team.
If you ever have questions about data integrity or have questions related to what you're seeing in apartment IQ, they're here to help you.
Our support team works really hard to ensure that all of the data that you're seeing is 100% accurate.

If however, you find that there's something that's not pulling through or something that you have questions about email in to support at apartment IQ dot IO or there's actually a section within apartment IQ called suggest an update that points to the same group of folks and I'll point that out today as well.

So let's go ahead and dive into the actual system here.
